## Location checklist

<!-- Delete this section for code-only pull requests. -->

- [ ] I captured the submitted screenshot myself.
- [ ] The HUD, minimap, cursor, heroes, and temporary effects are hidden.
- [ ] The location folder was generated by RooGuessr's **Edit answers** tool.
- [ ] `answer.txt` uses normalized coordinates from the bottom-left of the full map.
- [ ] I previewed every enabled difficulty crop.
- [ ] The Dota map version is recorded accurately.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally, or the pull request checks pass on GitHub.
